original:
As you touch it, a piercing alarm shatters the stillness of the treasury. Menes' hand slaps his other wrist with surprising speed. He raises it to his mouth to mumble a stand-down order to his security.

The alarm stops, leaving a painful echo in your ears.

option_line: bffi_apHorus20a:Tuck the glove into a pocket
original: Tuck the glove into a pocket

option_line: bffi_apHorus20b:Carry it openly back to the party
original: Carry it openly back to the party

The cousins of Gens Yaribay watch you leave.

Horus' eyes are black. Menes's are red with betrayal.

option_line: bffi_apHorus21:Make your way back to the party to find Bornanew and leave
original: Make your way back to the party to find Bornanew and leave

The cousins of Gens Yaribay watch you leave.

Horus' eyes are cool, unblinking. Menes' are red with betrayal.

option_line: bffi_apHorus21:Make your way back to the party to find Bornanew
original: Make your way back to the party to find Bornanew

Everyone turns and the conversation goes silent as you return to the main room. Alone.

You spot Bornanew, cornered by the man Ulmus Pond whose voice rings out for two words over-loudly as he realizes the fact of your entrance a moment later than the others.

His eyes are huge and bulging, like a fish.

Everyone turns to stare at you as the conversation goes silent the instant you return to the main room. Alone.

You spot Bornanew, cornered by the man Ulmus Pond whose voice rings out for two words over-loudly because he realized the fact of your entrance a moment later than everyone else. His eyes are huge and bulging, like a fish.

They seem to widen even more as Pond sees that you are simply holding Menes' prize relic. Bornanew, even, struggles to maintain his composure as he realizes what you have in your hands.

Pond gapes, enhancing the piscine effect.

Bornanew places an untouched drink of something fizzy and golden into Pond's hand, then walks with you back toward the shuttle bay.

"I presume you have... it?" he asks quietly, eyes forward.
